heading: Termination of program
label: 3751 Termination of program
text: The Secretary may not make commitments for financial assistance under this subchapter after .September 30, 1986
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83section 1851 of this title1989— substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”.Pub. L. 101–237
